entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne Mar '24
entry.content:
Time to raise a toast to the SAP Dev Community in Melbourne. Let's take the opportunity to catch up as we get well into 2024. No agenda, no requirements, just come along and be involved in the way you would like.

To coincide with the SAP BTP Innovation Day in Melbourne on Thursday 21st March 2024 at 5:30pm at The Bank on Collins

 Ground floor/394 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000.

 

When you arrive, you can ask for a booking under "SAP Regulars Table" 😉

I am really looking forward to sharing this informal community get together. Pass the word around!

See you there.

Ben.

entry.title: Re: Add icon to Action label in RAP
entry.content: Adding icon is supported - please see V4 specific section "Rendering Buttons with Icon Instead of Text" in page I shared above for more information!

entry.title: Re: vendor master list by purchasing group
entry.content: It doesn't work. It exports a PO list. Not the vendor list with purchasing group.

entry.title: Re: list of vendors by purchasing group
entry.content: cannot find the field about purchasing group via MKVZ

entry.title: Re: SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing – Overview and Key Resources for Integration Setup (SUP_EL
entry.content:
For SAP-internal employees, if the learning asset link does not work, you are missing an authorization for the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support. Please utilize the Internal Edition of SAP Learning Hub

Note:  First time users will be prompted to subscribe. The subscribe button is at the bottom of the page. Once you subscribe, you will get instant access to SAP Learning Hub, internal edition.

entry.title: Re: How to find SAP APIs for SAP S/4HANA 3-tier extensibility model

No, this works also with 'regular' ATP, not only with advanced ATP.

Best regards,

Michael

can it be automatically created while hiring an employee.

 

Can anyone help me with the configuration of this..????

entry.title: Re: Depreciation Base Method 0007 and 0011
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

It's a long time ask and I haven't got any logical reply from anyone on the BASE method used for depreciation calculations. So can anyone please help me to understand the difference between two depreciation BASE method variants i.e. "0007- percentage from life V$ 0011- percentage from useful life" with real time examples. Also when we create SLM depreciation key which BASE method is recommended and when we create WDV depreciation key which BASE method is recommended and why?

entry.content:
Hi,

Regards

entry.title: Re: Quantity fixed for delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I would suggest to check the scheduling agreement option, where the release schedules shall be created as required. Refer the documentation # Scheduling Agreement Releases: Process and Materials Planning and Scheduling Agreement Release 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1: TM master data based Sales Order Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi @Michael_Haase 

great blog! Thanks a lot for those more in-depth insights.

For us, there is one question which comes up here immediately: Does this also mean, that we do not necessarily need the SD Route anymore? Those transit & loading times could be managed by TM Objects. But the transportation lead time (especially the difference between planning seafreight and road freight..) still depends on the SD-Route, isn't it?

If so, is it the plan to manage this also with tm objects in later releases?

Thank you!

 

BR,

Christoph

entry.title: which option is better regarding integration between BTP subaccount access and IAS
entry.content:
<scenario>

Currently, customer has subscribed one BTP global accounts. they would like to access various subaccounts through IAS according to requirement, so we need to activate the IAS for BTP subaccounts.

We are currently implementing Successfactors (SF) system, and have created the IAS per SF instance to access SF through IAS, with the relationship SF:IAS=1:1; At the same time, We enhanced several  Fiori applications in BTP for SF system, and set up SSO between SF and BTP in order to directly access these Fiori applications through SSO from the SF side. Now we would like to activate IAS for BTP as well so that we can access both SF and BTP through IAS.

<Confirmation>

For integrating the IAS with BTP, we understand that IAS tenant is created per Subaccount, because we have created IAS tenants per SF. which is better between creating new IAS per BTP subaccount and using the existing IAS of SF? or is there any other better solution? Can you give me some suggestions? Thank you.

1. For BTP subaccount, we do not create a new IAS, but still use the existing IAS created by SF. Attachment ①

2. For BTP subaccount, do not use the existing IAS created by SF, but create a new IAS . Attachment ②

In addition, we can now access the Fiori application on BTP from SF by configuring SSO. If we use the attachment ② solution, because SF and BTP use different IAS, Is there be any problems affecting access to Fiori application? Please help confirm.

best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Linkage of personnel number with BP & Employee vendor...
entry.content: Can all three be linked ( BP , Employee Vendor account which is created inside BP , Personnel Number) can all three be linked & Created together

entry.title: Re: Why data type used for private attribute should be de...
entry.content: Hi Rossi, Question updated, maybe I didn't make it clear.

entry.title: Re: Build Apps - 500 Error
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981 This should resolve. "If you currently have an SAP Build Apps project deployed to SAP Build Work Zone, you should not encounter any issues. However, once you update your app, create a new build and deploy it to your SAP Build Work Zone page you will notice that access to the app will not work. Note: All SAP Build Apps users must make the changes described below before you deploy and integrate a new app version to SAP Build Work Zone, otherwise you risk losing access to your projects. "

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Due By Date in Service Requests (SMRQ) - S...
entry.content: To set a default "Due By" date as +5 days from the current date during Service Request creation in an SAP environment, you would typically use the SAP Project Reference Object (SPRO) to configure this. In SPRO, navigate through the Implementation Guide (IMG) to find the module relevant to Service Requests (likely under Customer Service, Plant Maintenance, or CRM). You might need to adjust date calculation settings or implement a custom solution using user exits or BAdIs with ABAP coding. There's no direct path in SPRO as it varies by the specific SAP module and version, so you'll need to explore the relevant module configurations or consult with an ABAP developer for a custom-coded solution. Always test changes in a non-production environment first.

entry.title: Re: SAP hana_ml ARIMAX with SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hello, These blogs have examples on using hana_ml in AI Core, for scheduling and inference via REST-APi

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-scheduling-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13577484

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-realtime-inference-with-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13578035

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit Developer Account
entry.content:

As an admin, I can log in to the Lobby section, but I open accounts for other people to make developments, but they cannot log in to the Lobby section.
I looked at the documentation on this issue, but I couldn't figure it out. Can you help me?
Thanks

My screenshots are as follows.

SAP BTP Cockpit

SAP BTP Cockpit

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Cockpit - Subaccount
SAP BTP Cockpit Subaccounts

 

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Lobby

entry.title: Re: Automated Emails when Service Request is Assigned to...
entry.content:
Hi dvan1,

I would recommend following below KBAs to configure your email actions/conditions for SMRQ, but it's recommended to copy standard SMRQ to your own transaction type like ZMRQ to do the changes:
2434880 - How to configure email notifications in ChaRM and ITSM - Solution Manager
3103731 - How to work with Action Definition and Action Conditions
Following above instructions to do necessary changes for the email notification configurations.
Thanks.

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

if the label is truncated, you can drag the line of axis to get the label expanded.

entry.title: Link to external url in sac table
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have a SAC story with detailed document number (each row is related to one document number). We would like to click on a link that open a pdf document showing the invoice related to the document number. 
what would be the best way to achieve that ?

i know that it is not possible to have image in cell.  We know to pass parameters to run external url but we are looking for the best way to display a clickable link. 
thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content:
Hello Daniel,

to be honest, I don't understand your description, what you want to do...

I recommend you start with an easy example, and from there you can go on:

https://help.sap.com/doc/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2022.12/en-us/b9b58a72342845cd91c14fd2c2b9a06c.html

FYI: There is also 1 Open SAP Course regarding Analytics Designer... I think "SAC3" it was, if I remember right.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: how to read all operations from memory in IW32
entry.content: I use function CO_BT_AFVG_GET_ALL

entry.title: Re: Field in RFC Response not being populated although it is in Message Mapping
entry.content:
Did you solve this ?

I tried:

- clearing all caches including full CPA cache refresh

- make a dummy change in the rfc channel and reactivate

- re activated the function module in backend and re imported it in PO

- restart "XPI Adapter: RFC" service using NWA

- I debugged the call in SAP and the value gets populated, but when it arrives in PO it is empty

entry.title: Re: Field in RFC Response not being populated although it is in Message Mapping
entry.content: Sorry double entry, but I can't delete it

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Washington DC

entry.title: Re: A Quick Guide To ABAP Debugger
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing this quick guide to ABAP Debugger! It's always great to come across resources that help simplify complex processes like debugging. ABAP Debugger can be quite powerful but navigating through it efficiently can sometimes be a challenge. Your guide seems like a handy reference for both beginners and experienced developers alike.

I particularly appreciate the step-by-step breakdown you've provided. Clear instructions make it much easier to follow along and apply the concepts in real-world scenarios. Do you have any additional tips or tricks for maximizing productivity with ABAP Debugger? I'm sure many of us would benefit from your insights.

Looking forward to more valuable content from you!

entry.title: How to start multiple hybirs locally.
entry.content:
Dear teams.

I would like to hear about local hybris.
I'm trying to start a local server in a thin client environment, but the following error occurs due to the structure of the thin client environment.

・Address already in use: bind

The way a thin client works is that one Windows is shared by multiple people.
Since one Windows is shared by multiple people, I think that when each person tries to start hybris, they cannot start it because the port is already in use.
I think this can be avoided if the person sharing the windows can change the port number used by hybris. Is there a way to change the local hybris port number?
Or if there is any other workaround, could you please let me know?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to start multiple hybirs locally.
entry.content: You may change the port in the correct file.

entry.title: Re: gCTS is still here
entry.content:
Hi,
sorry, me again... to avoid misunderstandings: the sentence 'Currently only BTP ABAP environment is integrated with cTMS to make use of transport landscapes.' is about ABAP systems and their integration in cTMS. cTMS does not support ABAP Development in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and Private edition or on-premise.

Kind regards

Karin

entry.title: Re: Order qunatity filed is blank
entry.content:
Hi,

It was unchecked, now i given tick mark. it is  working fine thank you so much for your quick response.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Oracle to Sybase Migration - Agreement upgrade and Cost for Sybase agreement
entry.content: We have migrated from Oracle to Sybase, what is the procedure to migrate our contract? And is a fee applicable for this?

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE not work under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. Central system is Client( 100 ) of Development Server. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system. I attach our test senario. By the way, excel file cannot uploaded ? 

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How can I use PMR with more than one storage locations?
entry.content:
Hi,

yes, a control cycle for advanced production integration does not allow a different storage location. You need to set this up using one storage location and then set up the stock determination (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/98cdcb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&q=stock%20determination) in order to stage the product from another storage location.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: How to display 3d pdf images in sap fiori and add a location marker inside that image?
entry.content:
I am working on a requirement where we need to display 3D Pdf images and also should be capable to add location markers inside it.
Could anyone guide or provide inputs on how we can achieve this in fiori?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thank you for the welcoming 😄

entry.title: About Using Text to Speech Feature in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi All,

We tried using the text to speech feature in SAP Enable Now for See-It simulations, and it is working. In preview mode, we can hear the audio. However, when we publish the MP4 format, the audio is not getting generated / not audible. If we do SCORM it will work, but our deliverable is only in MP4 format.

Kindly help.

entry.title: Re: POSC after LOSC
entry.content: Usually it is possible, but in your description I do not see a Picking step ( if it is Outbound process ) . But you can customize it and test, if it wont work, ask again and provide a bit more details.

entry.title: Re: POSC after LOSC
entry.content:
Hi,

"  Is it possible to perform POSC after LOSC?"

Yes, of course, why not?

Well, technically the system will always first have to find the process. For each process step, LOSC might be found due to your layout settings. But this means that what you physically see is first the LOSC steps.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: BAPI_USER_CHANGE not work under CUA environment
entry.content: I posted "Case". Please close this.

entry.title: Re: POSC after LOSC
entry.content: "Well, technically the system will always first have to find the process." I cannot fully agree wit this statement 🙂

entry.title: Re: Link to external url in sac table
entry.content: In your table external hyperlink settings you can click on the 'Show Hyperlinks in Table' option to make your document numbers clickable. Or as in this screenshot on Products:

entry.title: Re: Debugging custom logic using ADT in SAP S/4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Christina

we have a S4HC Public Cloud with a DEV & PROD tier.   I have adjusted my business user role to have unrestricted access to a role BR_DEVELOPER from the Role Template SAP_BR_DEVELOPER as per as per SAP Note 3259196  

But when I attempt from Eclipse ADT a New ABAP Cloud Project and specify the ABAP service instance for connecting to the cloud environment I still get the error below.  Any clues ?

The Browser opens and I enter in my email address to connect like I would normally do but then the message is shown in the Browser.

<exc:exception xmlns:exc="http://www.sap.com/abapxml/types/communicationframework">
<namespace id="com.sap.adt"/>
<type id="ExceptionResourceNoAuthorization"/>
<message lang="EN">No authorization to access the resource /sap/bc/adt/core/http/reentranceticket.</message>
<localizedMessage lang="EN">No authorization to access the resource /sap/bc/adt/core/http/reentranceticket.</localizedMessage>
<properties>
<entry key="T100KEY-ID">SADT_RESOURCE</entry>
<entry key="T100KEY-NO">003</entry>
<entry key="T100KEY-V2">/sap/bc/adt/core/http/reentranceticket</entry>
</properties>
</exc:exception>

entry.title: Calculated measures based on restricted measures
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I am trying to create a variance measure based on a restricted measure. Inside my restricted measure I have a Version restriction.

(Restricted measure 1)

(Restricted Measure 2)

So I just want make a simple calculation but after I create the calculation It does not appear on the table and neither I have a popup error about anything.

(Calculated Measure)

I guess that the only reason that the measure is not appearing is the fact that I have separate Version restrictions.

Thank you in advance guys.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation Editor can not be opened
entry.content: Hi Julia, could you please

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to Manage Abnormally Large Files with SFTP Adapter and SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing this insightful topic on managing abnormally large files with SFTP Adapter and SAP HANA Database for cloud integration. Handling large files can indeed pose significant challenges, especially when it comes to ensuring smooth data transfers and maintaining system performance.

Using SFTP Adapter in conjunction with SAP HANA Database sounds like a robust solution for managing such scenarios. It's essential to have reliable methods in place to handle these large files efficiently, ensuring data integrity and minimizing any potential disruptions in the integration process.

I'm particularly interested in learning more about the specific strategies or best practices you recommend for optimizing performance and mitigating potential bottlenecks when dealing with these large files. Any insights you can share would be greatly appreciated by the community.

entry.title: Re: CAP "schema_evolution": "auto" with SQLite does not w...
entry.content:
You can migrate to schema_evolution:auto with command cds deploy --model-only. You should do this before making changes to model that deviates from what is deployed.

See https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-postgres#migration

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content:
Hi Julia,

could you please add "debug: true" in your ui5.yaml. It should look like this:

- name: fiori-tools-preview 
  afterMiddleware: compression 
  configuration: 
   component: myapp 
   ui5Theme: sap_horizon 
   debug: true

afterwards please try to start the adaption editor again.

The file adaptation-editor.html is generated at runtime, so it does not need to be part of the webapp folder. The error code that you are getting indicates and issue with the backend

entry.title: Re: How to Use Fiori Element App in User task in BTP work...
entry.content:
Hi @appu24 

thank you for asking the question, we have the same requirement.

 

@Archana  / @Ivan-Mirisola:

Unfortunately, the tutorials do not describe how to integrate an existing Fiori Elements app.
They only show how to generate/design a UI5 "form".

Is it possible to integrate a Fiori Elements app as a workflow step/task?
If yes, is there an example/a tutorial?

Kind regards,
Alexander

entry.title: Re: About Asset Accounting, How to add my company code to...
entry.content: The reason has finally been identified - it stems from an issue of authority.

entry.title: RAP V4+Flexible Programming Model macro Table editable
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have RAP managed with draft  OData V 4. I created an app in VS Code. I want to have editable table in my list report. I use sap.fe.macros.Table. 

 
When I tried to preview my app, the table can´t be edited:
 
When I open object page and press edit button, the table is then in then in edit mode:
 
Opening object page with edit mode causes some issues by editing. How can I start with the table in edit mode without opening object page / detail page?
please help.
thank you.
Jarda

entry.title: Re: Find Table for SQ01: statistic of Variant Configurato...
entry.content: Thank you for the answer! I am just at the beginning to learn how to program SQ01. CUOBJS is a structure: can I use it? I have not seen any Characteristics and values from the Variant Configuration in CUOBJS andf VBAK. Do you know any table with VC Chars & Values?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

I am a newbie, I graduated in Accounting and I have had a few years working as an accountant but things are getting harder in my field. That was when I discovered SAP and want to pursue the career of a SAP FICO Consultant. I feel very lucky that I found this post.

 I identify myself with the following categories:

  • Women
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location

Thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: Why data type used for private attribute should be de...
entry.content: Please do not post a solution for commenting the question. Use the link "Show replies" below the question and then "Comment".

entry.title: Re: Seeking Advice: Bridging Experience Gap for Role as a SAP CPI Consultant
entry.content: Thank you for the resource links!!!

entry.title: Re: Why data type used for private attribute should be defined in class-relevant local definition?
entry.content: By "silly", I wanted to say that the question is asking "why is sky not blue" although sky is blue. Private attributes can be defined in any class, even test classes (although I don't understand why you need to define types in test classes, I think of situations where I could possibly need types for defining a short list of columns to compare but instead I'm using constructor expressions).

entry.title: change company name & address
entry.content:
Hi Sap
my company has change name and address.

so i want to change that for all users in system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: change company name & address
entry.content:
Dear customer!
Please refer to the following SAP Community article:
https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-q-a/how-to-change-company-address-in-su01-for-the-users-with-bp-assigned-to/qaq-p/789501

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 2
entry.content: No bonus for me this time :(.

entry.title: Function Location Label showing different then created
Re: Secure your LLM: Consuming SAP Generative AI deployments in a Simple Python App
entry.content: This sounds like a promising approach to ensuring the security of LLM deployments while simplifying integration into Python applications. For those interested in enhancing their AI capabilities securely, I recommend considering SpringsApps for AI chatbot development. Their expertise in AI solutions could be invaluable for implementing SAP Generative AI deployments effectively.

entry.title: How to extract the Deleted Comments in Goal Section from Performance Form
entry.content: How to extract the Deleted Comments in Goal Section from Performance Form

entry.title: Eclipse - Add Software- PKIX path error due to certificate missing in JRE std trust store
entry.content:
Hello Eclipsers out there, 
right after installing and opening Eclipse 2023-12, I wanted to add the SAP tools via Menu/Help/Install new software....using work with URL: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2023-12

I got a popup with the error  "Unable to read repository at   https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2023-12/content.xml    "

With details in the error log: 

PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target

Although I finally found an easy one, I would be interested in your approaches to fix it. I will share after some comments.

And if anyone knows where the SCN Wiki  (https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/display/SAPHCP/SAP+Development+Tools+for+Eclipse+Installation%3A+FAQ+and+Known+Issues) is gone, which they still have on  https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2023-12/ 

They just reroute to the start page of the new community.

Regs
Ulf

entry.title: Re: Please help guide me
entry.content:
You mention school system. If your experience is in education then have you considered the training aspect?

In my experience many of the people who give training / prepare training material don't have the education background. While their knowledge, training material and presentation is often excellent, it doesn't necessarily take into consideration the different ways, different people learn.

What I am thinking is "train the trainer".

Good luck with the career change.

Gavin

entry.title: Re: Function Location Label showing different then created
entry.content: Please guide to display the actual created label

entry.title: Wht is the reason for payment block if we done GR after the invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have done an invoice for PO without GR. The invoice is now blocked for payment.

After that, we did GR for the same PO line item. 

1. After doing the GR, the payment block for the invoice will be reverted, right? Still, the invoice is displaying as payment for block. What would be the reason for blocking the invoice for payment?

The quantity invoiced and Gr have the same amount as well, but the invoice is blocked for payment?

2. When we checked the document workflow, GR and IR documents were not mapped. How can we map the GR and IR documents? 

 

Regards,

Siva

entry.title: Re: Host a Code Jam in Kolkata( Build Apps)
entry.content:
Hello Spandan,

Thanks for showing interest to host a CodeJam on SAP Build. I will provide you more details in the mail.

Best Regards,

Shilpa

entry.title: SAP Transportation Management public Cloud
entry.content:
We want to create different freight unit number ranges for the respective plants at the customer's 2 plants.
Is SAP TM in the public cloud limited to the one existing number range or where can we maintain an alternative?
Greetings
Bastian

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...

entry.title: Re: Build service failed community edition
entry.content:
Hi, I was able to use Build (Web App) successfully yesterday but today it failed again with error:

Runtime Version: 4.9.150
Status: error
Error Message: Unknown error, contact support for more details.
Queued at: 01/03/2024, 10:40:07
Build ID: 19789
